LanguageData.BSL_LaunchShuttleDesc: Configure or launch a passenger shuttle on this map.
LanguageData.BSL_NoShuttles: No passenger shuttles are available on this map.
LanguageData.BSL_NoAvailableShuttles: No available passenger shuttles on this map.
LanguageData.BSL_ReturnHomeDesc: Launch this passenger shuttle toward one of your home maps.
LanguageData.BSL_NoValidHome: No valid home destination is available.
LanguageData.BSL_LaunchWhenReadyDesc: Choose a destination now and automatically launch when loading, cooldown, and vanilla launch requirements are satisfied.
LanguageData.BSL_CancelQueuedLaunchDesc: Cancel only the scheduled automatic launch. Existing loading orders are left unchanged.
LanguageData.BSL_LastDepartureCellUnavailable: The last departure spot cannot be used.
LanguageData.BSL_AutoReturnLandingFallback: Could not use the last departure landing spot: {0}
LanguageData.BSL_ShuttleTrackerHeaderTooltip: Shuttle control. Right-drag the header to move this panel.
LanguageData.BSL_TrackerFilterAllTooltip: Showing all player passenger shuttles. Click to show only shuttles currently on this map.
LanguageData.BSL_TrackerFilterLocalTooltip: Showing only shuttles currently on this map. Click to show all player passenger shuttles.
LanguageData.BSL_ShuttleFocusTooltip: {0}\nClick to jump to this shuttle or its current world position.
LanguageData.BSL_FocusShuttleTooltip: Jump to this shuttle or its current world position.
LanguageData.BSL_ReadyShortcutTooltip: Open loading and destination selection, then schedule launch when ready.
LanguageData.BSL_QuickReturnTooltip: Schedule a return launch to the last departure map.
LanguageData.BSL_MenuLaunchToSettlementDesc: List other player settlements and schedule launch after choosing a landing spot.
LanguageData.BSL_MenuReturnDesc: Schedule a return launch to the last departure map.
LanguageData.BSL_MenuCancelQueuedLaunchDesc: Cancel the scheduled automatic launch. Existing loading orders remain unchanged.
LanguageData.BSL_SelectSettlementDestinationTooltip: Schedule launch to {0}. You will choose a landing spot next.
LanguageData.BSL_ReturnWithLandingSelectionTooltip: Return to {0} and choose a landing spot.
LanguageData.BSL_ReturnToLastDepartureCellTooltip: Return to {0} and use the last departure spot if it is still valid.
LanguageData.BSL_SettingHideVanillaLaunchCommandDesc: Uses Better Shuttle Launch's unified Launch When Ready command as the main shuttle command.
LanguageData.BSL_SettingShowLaunchStatusInInspectPane: Show launch status in the inspect pane
Shows the same vanilla launch-blocking reason in the lower-left inspect pane.
LanguageData.BSL_SettingShowTrackerWindowDesc: Shows the control window for the current map and player passenger shuttles.
LanguageData.BSL_SettingShowTrackerRouteEndpointIcons: Shows the origin and destination at both ends of the tracker route as clickable icons.
LanguageData.BSL_SettingShowMapPassengerOverlay: Show passenger icons on the map
LanguageData.BSL_SettingShowMapPassengerOverlayDesc: Shows a small passenger icon over map shuttles that have loaded pawns.
LanguageData.BSL_SettingShowTrackerHoverHelpAndHighli: Show tracker hover help and highlights
Shows tooltips and target highlights when hovering over tracker UI elements.
LanguageData.BSL_SettingPauseOnShuttleArrivalDesc: Pauses the game once when a scheduled shuttle reaches its destination.
LanguageData.BSL_SettingFocusOnShuttleArrivalDesc: Jumps the camera to the arrived shuttle, destination map, or world tile when a scheduled shuttle arrives.
